text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It reminds me of... the open fields back<n>home.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Jogging through those fields was the<n>best...
Makes me want to run!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no, I can't! Mustn't run in the<n>halls...
Running in the halls is bad...
